# <div>Brainstorming</div>

## Context
From document: Week 1 | Overview — chunk 28 (chunk 28/75)

## Content
<div>Brainstorming</div>
<div>Brainstorming aims to develop ideas once you already have a topic. When you brainstorm, you freely associate to develop all possible ideas related to a topic. You jot down any ideas, no matter how different they are, so that you can capture all the parts of the case that occur to you.</div>
<div>Graphic Organizers</div>
<div>Graphic organizers aim to develop ideas about a topic and group similar ideas. <u>One good example is a cognitive map or bubble map.</u><br></div>
<div><u>Links to an external site.</u><br></div>
<div> Jot down your thoughts and, as you are doing so, link related information to show relationships.</div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,
